title: caleya minor
intro: Caleya minor, also known as small caleya or mountain rosemary, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Caleya minor include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Caleya minor can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
